description: Meet the original superhero before superheroes were cool! Front and center, Lady Liberty herself charges forward, barefoot and unbothered, waving the French tricolor flag in one hand and a bayonet musket in the other. She's basically the 1830 equivalent of a viral motivational poster. Around her, a ragtag squad of revolutionaries climbs over the barricades: a wide-eyed boy brandishing two pistols (looking very 'main character'), a sharply dressed gentleman with a top hat gripping a rifle, and fallen fighters strewn dramatically across the foreground. Smoke and golden light swirl behind them, with the towers of Notre-Dame faintly peeking through the haze. This card cleverly turned a national masterpiece into a pocket-sized Ace of Diamonds — talk about playing your trump card!
ambiance: Electric, heroic and gloriously chaotic — equal parts triumph and tension, like the climactic scene of an action movie frozen in oil paint.
